description: Agent-friendly Context.dev CLI for website intelligence, brand enrichment, scraping, crawling, structured extraction, screenshots, styleguides, competitor maps, source packs, and change digests.

novel_features.name: Scrape Markdown
novel_features.description: One-argument URL-to-Markdown wrapper for LLM-ready page content.

novel_features.name: Same-domain crawl
novel_features.description: Credit-aware crawl wrapper with same-domain URL regex, default max-pages 5, estimate mode, and confirmation above 25 pages.

novel_features.name: Typed extraction
novel_features.description: URL plus JSON Schema file wrapper for structured website extraction.

novel_features.name: Styleguide extraction
novel_features.description: One-argument design-system extraction wrapper for domains or URLs.

novel_features.name: Screenshot preview
novel_features.description: One-argument screenshot wrapper for domains or direct URLs.

novel_features.name: Entity discover
novel_features.description: Fielded public entity search with brand and scrape enrichment, sensitive/free-form input rejection, heuristic ranking, and per-record provenance.

novel_features.name: Brand brief
novel_features.description: Domain-to-normalized brand profile composing brand retrieval, styleguide, screenshot, scrape summary, contact surfaces, and provenance.

novel_features.name: Competitor map
novel_features.description: Competitor discovery and enrichment from a seed domain or query, clustered by category/market with ranking rationale and overlap signals.

novel_features.name: Crawl budget plan
novel_features.description: Non-spending crawl planner that estimates same-domain urlRegex scope, max pages, credits, coverage, risks, and recommended crawl command.

novel_features.name: Source pack
novel_features.description: Search-and-scrape source collection with optional schema extraction, cited source URLs, zero-result distinction, and per-claim/source provenance.

novel_features.name: Website change digest
novel_features.description: State-dir website snapshots for scrape, styleguide, and screenshot signals with local diff output across copy, facts/links, and visual identity.

novel_features.name: Schema lab
novel_features.description: Batch extraction schema test harness for sample URLs with fill rates, parse failures, example misses, per-URL statuses, and partial-failure tolerance.

novel_features.name: Asset pack
novel_features.description: Compact designer/agent asset bundle composing logo, palette, fonts, styleguide, screenshot, favicon, socials, and provenance.

novel_features.name: Trust check
novel_features.description: Website, social, address, phone, logo, title/domain, and web-signal consistency report that phrases output as risk signals, not fraud claims.

novel_features.name: Lead enrich batch
novel_features.description: CSV lead enrichment with per-row success/error output, provenance, resume/output support, rate-limit compatibility, and strict-mode opt-in.

catalog_description: Agent-friendly Context.dev CLI for website intelligence, brand enrichment, scraping, crawling, structured extraction, screenshots, styleguides, competitor maps, source packs, and change digests.
